description: Execute a plan until it is complete

content: Please read AGENTS.md and follow its instructions. Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` first and treat it as the sole source of review scope for this flow. Support both the legacy single-repository shape `{ "plan_path": "planning/<story-file>.md" }` and the newer shape `{ "plan_path": "planning/<story-file>.md", "additional_repositories": ["/abs/path/to/repo-b"] }`. If the legacy shape is present, treat that as an empty `additional_repositories` list. The current repository is the canonical plan host and is implicitly in scope, so it must not appear inside `additional_repositories`. Verify that the selected plan exists in the current repository, that the selected plan filename carries the story number that matches the current repository branch, and that each participating additional repository matches that same story branch. If those checks fail, stop and say the current-plan handoff is stale and must be regenerated. Do NOT use code_info tools for plan selection. Confirm what story the normalized review scope represents, list the participating repositories when there is more than one, and provide me with an overview of what is still remaining to be done without making file changes at this time.

Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` first and use only the stored `plan_path` and `additional_repositories` as the active scope for this flow. If possible, git push the story branch in the current repository and in every repository listed in `additional_repositories`.
